conflicts.description: Chapter 1 and chapter 2 both show Kael asking when they are going to Papa / whether Baba will know where to find them, but chapter 4 states that Kael had never asked about Sev.
conflicts.canonical_value: Kael has already been asking about Papa/Sev before chapter 4; the chapter 4 summary sentence is non-canonical.
conflicts.resolution_note: The direct dialogue in chapters 1 and 2 is more deeply embedded in Suna's lie-management and the family dynamic than the later summary sentence, so the explicit scenes govern continuity.
